microsoft-dynamics365-ecosystem.notes: Pure SaaS business-apps suite (D365 CRM/ERP + Power Platform low-code); PL-300 BI crosses to data-ai.

oracle-ecosystem.notes: Oracle Database is the primary anchor (data-ai); OCI is cloud, Fusion/EBS/PeopleSoft/NetSuite are software, Linux/Java/Solaris cross to systems.

healthcare-it.notes: Multi-vendor topic (Epic, Oracle Health/Cerner, Meditech, HL7/FHIR, HIPAA); no single ecosystem anchor — keep as specialty track but cross-list to systems for clinical-system admins.

aws-ecosystem.notes: Hyperscaler cloud platform; specialty certs (Security, AI/ML, DevOps) cross to security/devops/data-ai.

microsoft-azure-m365-ecosystem.notes: Hyperscaler cloud + M365 productivity; AZ-500/SC-* cross to security, AI-102 to data-ai, SC-300 to identity.

workday-ecosystem.notes: Pure SaaS HCM/Financials platform — gated training; HR-systems specialization fits itmgmt column.

adobe-experience-cloud.notes: SaaS digital experience suite (AEM, Analytics, Target, Marketo, Commerce); analytics/CDP certs cross to data-ai.

observability-platforms.notes: Multi-vendor topic file (Datadog, New Relic, Dynatrace, Elastic, Honeycomb, AppDynamics, Prometheus/Grafana); no single primary domain — keep in vendor-only ladder.

salesforce-ecosystem.notes: Already exists as a top-level SaaS ecosystem mini-grid; merge Deep Dive certs into existing salesforce entry rather than cross-listing to a domain column.

sap-ecosystem.notes: Already exists as a top-level SaaS ecosystem mini-grid; merge Deep Dive certs into existing sap entry.

servicenow-ecosystem.notes: Already exists as a top-level SaaS ecosystem mini-grid; merge Deep Dive certs into existing servicenow entry.

ibm-ecosystem.notes: Mixed portfolio anchored by mainframe Z + AIX/Power + storage (systems); IBM Cloud crosses to cloud, watsonx to data-ai, Cloud Pak for Security to security. Mainframe doesn't fit any of the 6 hardware mini-grid subcategories so kept as saas.

vmware-broadcom-ecosystem.notes: Virtualization/hypervisor leader (vSphere, vSAN, NSX, Tanzu); hypervisor-on-appliance ecosystem rooted in datacenter systems.

cisco-ecosystem.notes: Networking hardware leader (Catalyst, Nexus, ISR); CCNP Security/DevNet automation cross-list.

juniper-ecosystem.notes: Routing/switching hardware (MX, EX, QFX, Junos OS); Security track (JNCIS-SEC) cross-lists. Now part of HPE.

hashicorp-ecosystem.notes: Pure software IaC platform (Terraform, Vault, Consul); Vault crosses to security, IBM-acquired Feb 2025.

paloalto-networks-ecosystem.notes: NGFW appliance leader (Strata); Prisma Cloud crosses to cloud, CyberArk acquisition (Feb 2026) adds identity.

crowdstrike-ecosystem.notes: Cloud-native EDR/XDR SaaS (Falcon platform); identity-protection module crosses to identity.

atlassian-ecosystem.notes: SaaS dev collaboration suite (Jira, Confluence, Bitbucket, Opsgenie, Compass).

mulesoft-ecosystem.notes: iPaaS/API-led integration platform (Anypoint); Salesforce subsidiary — integration-architect specialty.

fortinet-ecosystem.notes: FortiGate NGFW appliance leader; FortiSASE/FortiSwitch cross to networking.

checkpoint-ecosystem.notes: Quantum NGFW appliances + CloudGuard; firewall-rooted security ecosystem.

f5-ecosystem.notes: BIG-IP ADC/load-balancer appliances + NGINX; closest hardware sub is switch-router (network-edge appliance). WAF/Distributed Cloud crosses to security.

netapp-ecosystem.notes: ONTAP storage arrays + cloud data services; storage-rooted ecosystem.

purestorage-ecosystem.notes: All-flash storage arrays (FlashArray, FlashBlade); AI infrastructure partnerships cross to data-ai.

veeam-ecosystem.notes: Backup/data-resilience software (no appliance); security-hardened backup crosses to security.

nutanix-ecosystem.notes: HCI/AHV hypervisor on appliance — primary VMware-migration destination post-Broadcom.

okta-ecosystem.notes: Cloud IAM SaaS (Workforce + Customer Identity/Auth0); Okta-Identity-Threat-Protection crosses to security.

cyberark-ecosystem.notes: PAM market leader (now Palo Alto-owned Feb 2026); privileged access governance is identity-rooted.

snowflake-ecosystem.notes: Pure SaaS data cloud warehouse + Cortex AI; data-ai through and through.

databricks-ecosystem.notes: Lakehouse + ML platform; ML/Generative-AI engineer tracks all map to data-ai.

splunk-ecosystem.notes: SIEM + observability SaaS (Cisco-owned); ES/SOAR security-rooted, observability cloud crosses to devops.

aruba-hpe-ecosystem.notes: HPE Aruba wireless + CX switches + SD-WAN/EdgeConnect (Silver Peak); wireless-led networking hardware.

arista-ecosystem.notes: Hyperscaler/AI data-center switching (EOS); automation-track (AVD/CloudVision) crosses to devops.

sailpoint-ecosystem.notes: IGA market leader — pure governance/lifecycle SaaS; complements Okta (auth) and CyberArk (PAM).

cloudflare-ecosystem.notes: Edge/SASE platform — Cloudflare One unified security is 2026 anchor; Workers serverless crosses to devops, CDN/DNS to networking.

sentinelone-ecosystem.notes: Singularity XDR/EDR SaaS; AI-SIEM/Purple AI direct CrowdStrike competitor.

zscaler-ecosystem.notes: SSE/SASE leader (ZIA, ZPA, ZDX); zero-trust security-rooted with SD-WAN/networking cross-list.

akamai-ecosystem.notes: Legacy CDN pioneer turned edge/security/cloud platform; CDN/edge anchors networking, Akamai Security Suite + Connected Cloud (Linode) cross-list.
